Hi {{contributor}}, thank you for contributing to PR Maven CLI.

I appreciate the time you spent opening this {{contribution_type}}. This project is intentionally shaped for focused, reviewable open source contributions, so your input helps the tool become more useful for Java and Maven teams.

A maintainer will review the context, labels, and next steps as soon as possible. If this is your first contribution here, welcome aboard.

Useful links:

- Contributing guide: `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- Testing guide: `docs/testing.md`
- CI/CD guide: `docs/ci.md`

Thank you for helping build a deterministic, local-first Maven failure triage tool.
